title: `Ammiyzabad #5990
definition:
Ammizabad = "my people have bestowed"

 1) son of Benaiah, who commanded the 3rd division of David's army
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ammizabad = "my people have bestowed"

 1) son of Benaiah, who commanded the 3rd division of David's army

    NASB:  my kinsman has bestowed, an Isr.
